goals: produce a preliminary version of content
remove fluid or energy from a container or system
reduce capacity to a lower level
adapt or present with heightened emotional impact
cover or accentuate a form with flowing layers
prepare emotionally for an unwanted outcome
prepare surface for presentation or protection
control intermittent motion in small drops or bounces
allow change in focus or position
bore openings or instill repeated practice
ingest fluid for hydration or enjoyment
apply a light, fine spray or stream
operate unmanned aircraft for observation or delivery

positional: line of sight or control link

goals: sink or bend downward from fatigue or weight
perform dull or menial work persistently

physical: access to absorbent or heat source
